long_description:
NRE were alerted of link between fas19a.sr02.dal12 Et2/1 <-> fcs367b.sr02.dal12 Et49/1 going down. Raising this INC to track progress.


https://github.ibm.com/IaaS-NRE/nreincidents/issues/19660
short_description: fas19a.sr02.dal12 Et2/1 <-> fcs367b.sr02.dal12 Et49/1 | Link Down
close_notes: Link shut to mitigate any further impact. Will proceed to do Layer1 troubleshooting to resolve any issues with the link before adding it back to service. (Note: This incident was resolved via one-touch automation.)
